summary: Tested PDF Editor feature end-to-end (backend + frontend). All 9 backend pytest cases passed (upload, page render, save with whiteout+text, download, error paths). All 11 frontend UI flows passed via Playwright: navigation to editor, PDF upload, page render, whiteout draw, text add with bold/italic/color/font-size, both color pickers, save with success message, undo, delete, back. No critical issues found.

minor.issue: EditorEditItem allows arbitrary type strings; non-'text'/'whiteout' types are silently ignored. Consider Literal['text','whiteout'] for stricter validation.
No file size limit enforced for editor uploads (translation /api/upload has 100MB limit but editor does not).
allow_credentials=True with allow_origins='*' default is invalid per CORS spec; browsers will block credentialed requests. Set explicit origins via CORS_ORIGINS env.

issues: Whiteout color swatches lack data-testid attributes (text-color swatches have them) - inconsistency for testability

action_items: (Optional) Add max file size guard on /api/editor/upload to prevent large PDFs.
(Optional) Tighten EditorEditItem.type with pydantic Literal validator and return 422 on invalid types.
(Optional) Add data-testid to whiteout color swatch buttons for symmetry with text color swatches.
(Optional) Configure CORS_ORIGINS explicitly since allow_credentials=True + wildcard is inconsistent.
critical_code_review_comments: PdfEditor.js is ~683 lines; consider splitting toolbar/canvas/upload screens into separate components for maintainability.

fabric coordinate -> PDF mapping uses scaleFactor based only on width; assumes uniform scaling. Works because canvas keeps aspect ratio but height-axis mapping uses x-scale - consider explicit y-scale if non-uniform scaling occurs.
Save endpoint always re-renders preview pages_edited even though the frontend doesn't consume them - extra disk I/O.
No cleanup of /tmp/pdf_editor/{job_id} - jobs accumulate indefinitely (14 already present in /tmp/pdf_editor).
seed_data_creation: Used existing /tmp/test_invoice2.pdf for all upload tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_pdf_editor.py. Test PDF at /tmp/test_invoice2.pdf. Frontend Playwright flow validated whiteout via mouse drag on canvas, text via mouse click + keyboard. The PdfEditor uses fabric.js 7.3.1 with separate + overlay; canvas captures mouse via upper-canvas. Save is idempotent and re-creates edited.pdf each call.
